changes: Shukuchi: The Hidden effect will now end even when using Sprint.
Meisui: Base cure potency has been reduced from 10,000 to 8,000.
Paradox: This action no longer has charges.
Night Wing: Half-asleep effect no longer reduces target movement speed.
Soul Resonance: Damage reduction from the Apocatastasis effect has been changed from 20% to 10%.

new_content.name: Omega: Beyond the Rift
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest line.

new_content.name: A Heartless Hypothesis
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Goodbye, ε̆│\̆│Δ
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Small Business, Big Dreams
new_content.description: Tataru's Grand Endeavor side story quest.

new_content.name: Arkasodara Tribal Quests
new_content.description: Tribal quest series with daily quests and automatic level adjustment (quest sync).

new_content.name: Quest Sync
new_content.description: Automatic level adjustment system that matches battle difficulty to the player's current job and class levels.

new_content.name: Custom Deliveries: Ameliance
new_content.description: System allowing players to provide items to Ameliance to receive gil, experience, and scrips.

new_content.name: Triple Triad
new_content.description: New cards and NPC opponents added to the Gold Saucer.

housing.name: Raised Wooden Deck
housing.description: An elevated platform designed for access by only those who dare to hop, skip, or jump.

housing.name: Log Pillar
housing.description: A decorative wooden pillar designed to resemble the tree it came from.

housing.name: Iron Chair
housing.description: A refined chair wrought with diligence.

housing.name: Stuffed Sanduruva
housing.description: Said to bring prosperity to the one who displays it. Any rumors that great wealth is hidden within are certainly exaggerated.

housing.name: Stuffed Minduruva
housing.description: Said to bestow talent in the arts to the one who displays it. Any reports of it crafting shoes by night are likely exaggerated.

housing.name: Stuffed Cinduruva
housing.description: Said to bless the one who displays it with wisdom. Any reports of its eyes moving on their own accord are greatly exaggerated. Probably.

housing.name: Sweetfish Skewers
housing.description: Lightly salted and roasted to perfection, these sweetfish skewers make for a simple-yet-sublime snack.

housing.name: Ornamental Crystal Array
housing.description: A decorative wall ornament dripping with jewels.

housing.name: Simple Arched Window
housing.description: An arched window lovely in its simplicity.

glamour.name: Appointed Shoes

glamour.name: Appointed Attire Coffer
glamour.description: A banded chest containing a complete set of appointed attire.
